classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d10 (or 6) + your Constitution modifier per Fighter level after 1st

proficiencies_desc.armor: Light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, shields
proficiencies_desc.skills: Choose two from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, or Survival

classes.starting_equipment:
Choose between:
(a) chain mail or (b) leather armor, longbow, and 20 arrows
(a) a martial weapon and shield or (b) two martial weapons
(a) a light crossbow and 20 bolts or (b) two handaxes
(a) a dungeoneer's pack or (b) an explorer's pack
classes.quick_build: Make Strength or Dexterity your highest ability score. Your next-highest score should be Constitution, or Intelligence if you plan to become an Eldritch Knight. Choose the soldier background.
classes.multiclassing: Ability Score Minimum: Strength 13 or Dexterity 13. Proficiencies gained from multiclassing: light armor, medium armor, shields, simple weapons, and martial weapons.

feat_fig_fighting_style.name: Fighting Style
feat_fig_fighting_style.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one Fighting Style option.

feat_fig_style_archery.name: Archery
feat_fig_style_archery.description: You gain a bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

feat_fig_style_blind_fighting.name: Blind Fighting
feat_fig_style_blind_fighting.description: You have blindsight with a limited range, letting you perceive nearby hidden or invisible creatures.

feat_fig_style_defense.name: Defense
feat_fig_style_defense.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a bonus to your Armor Class.

feat_fig_style_dueling.name: Dueling
feat_fig_style_dueling.description: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

feat_fig_style_great_weapon_fighting.name: Great Weapon Fighting
feat_fig_style_great_weapon_fighting.description: When you roll damage for an attack you make with a two-handed or versatile melee weapon, you can reroll low damage dice results.

feat_fig_style_interception.name: Interception
feat_fig_style_interception.description: When a creature you can see hits a target other than you with an attack, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage.

feat_fig_style_protection.name: Protection
feat_fig_style_protection.description: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll.

feat_fig_style_superior_technique.name: Superior Technique
feat_fig_style_superior_technique.description: You learn one maneuver of your choice and gain one superiority die to fuel it.

feat_fig_style_thrown_weapon_fighting.name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
feat_fig_style_thrown_weapon_fighting.description: You can draw and throw a weapon more easily, and your thrown weapon attacks deal additional damage.

feat_fig_style_two_weapon_fighting.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
feat_fig_style_two_weapon_fighting.description: You can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack you make with a different light weapon.

feat_fig_style_unarmed_fighting.name: Unarmed Fighting
feat_fig_style_unarmed_fighting.description: Your unarmed strikes deal increased damage, and you can deal damage while grappling creatures.

feat_fig_second_wind.name: Second Wind
feat_fig_second_wind.description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm. On your turn, you can use a Bonus Action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your Fighter level. Once you use this feature, you must finish a Short or Long Rest before you can use it again.

feat_fig_action_surge.name: Action Surge
feat_fig_action_surge.description: You can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action, except the Magic action. Once you use this feature, you must finish a Short or Long Rest before you can use it again. The number of uses increases to 2 at 17th level.

feat_fig_signature_maneuver.name: Signature Maneuver
feat_fig_signature_maneuver.description: You learn one maneuver that reflects your own combat identity. You can use it with a superiority die.

feat_maneuver_ambush.name: Ambush
feat_maneuver_ambush.description: You add your superiority die to your Initiative or to your Stealth check, representing an unexpected opening move.

feat_maneuver_bait_and_switch.name: Bait and Switch
feat_maneuver_bait_and_switch.description: You use footwork and feints to swap places with an ally and boost defenses.

feat_maneuver_brace.name: Brace
feat_maneuver_brace.description: When a creature moves into your reach, you can strike decisively and punish its approach.

feat_maneuver_commanders_strike.name: Commander's Strike
feat_maneuver_commanders_strike.description: You give up one of your own attacks to let an ally strike with an extra attack.

feat_maneuver_commanding_presence.name: Commanding Presence
feat_maneuver_commanding_presence.description: You bolster a social check using battlefield authority and force of personality.

feat_maneuver_disarming_attack.name: Disarming Attack
feat_maneuver_disarming_attack.description: You force an enemy to drop its weapon or object.

feat_maneuver_distracting_strike.name: Distracting Strike
feat_maneuver_distracting_strike.description: You distract your target, making it easier for the next ally to hit it.

feat_maneuver_evasive_footwork.name: Evasive Footwork
feat_maneuver_evasive_footwork.description: You improve your defense while moving, making yourself harder to hit.

feat_maneuver_feinting_attack.name: Feinting Attack
feat_maneuver_feinting_attack.description: You deceive your target to gain advantage on your next attack.

feat_maneuver_goading_attack.name: Goading Attack
feat_maneuver_goading_attack.description: You irritate and provoke a creature into focusing on you.

feat_maneuver_grappling_strike.name: Grappling Strike
feat_maneuver_grappling_strike.description: You turn a hit into a controlling clinch and attempt to grapple the target.

feat_maneuver_lunging_attack.name: Lunging Attack
feat_maneuver_lunging_attack.description: You extend your reach for a sudden attack.

feat_maneuver_maneuvering_attack.name: Maneuvering Attack
feat_maneuver_maneuvering_attack.description: You reposition an ally by creating an opening in the fight.

feat_maneuver_menacing_attack.name: Menacing Attack
feat_maneuver_menacing_attack.description: You strike with fearsome force and can frighten the target.

feat_maneuver_parry.name: Parry
feat_maneuver_parry.description: You reduce damage from a melee attack using your weapon skill.

feat_maneuver_precision_attack.name: Precision Attack
feat_maneuver_precision_attack.description: You turn a near miss into a hit by adding your superiority die to the attack roll.

feat_maneuver_pushing_attack.name: Pushing Attack
feat_maneuver_pushing_attack.description: You drive a target backward with a powerful strike.

feat_maneuver_rally.name: Rally
feat_maneuver_rally.description: You inspire an ally with temporary hit points.

feat_maneuver_riposte.name: Riposte
feat_maneuver_riposte.description: When a creature misses you, you strike back in response.

feat_maneuver_sweeping_attack.name: Sweeping Attack
feat_maneuver_sweeping_attack.description: You strike multiple enemies in a broad swing.

feat_maneuver_tactical_assessment.name: Tactical Assessment
feat_maneuver_tactical_assessment.description: You use battlefield experience to improve Insight, Investigation, or History.

feat_maneuver_trip_attack.name: Trip Attack
feat_maneuver_trip_attack.description: You knock a creature prone with your strike.

feat_maneuver_whirling_strike.name: Whirling Strike
feat_maneuver_whirling_strike.description: You make a sweeping combat motion that pressures multiple enemies nearby.

feat_fig_martial_archetype.name: Martial Archetype
feat_fig_martial_archetype.description: You choose a Martial Archetype, which grants you features at higher levels.

feat_fig_martial_versatility.name: Martial Versatility
feat_fig_martial_versatility.description: You can change a Fighting Style or a maneuver whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, reflecting your evolving martial training.

feat_fig_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_fig_asi.description: When you reach certain fighter levels, you can increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1, or take a feat.

feat_fig_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_fig_extra_attack.description: You can attack multiple times when you take the Attack action. The number of attacks increases to 2 at 5th level, 3 at 11th level, and 4 at 20th level.

feat_fig_indomitable.name: Indomitable
feat_fig_indomitable.description: You can reroll a failed saving throw. You must use the new roll, and you regain uses after a Long Rest. You gain additional uses at 13th and 17th level.

feat_sub_arcane_archer_lore.name: Arcane Archer Lore
feat_sub_arcane_archer_lore.description: You gain proficiency in either Arcana or Nature, and you learn the Prestidigitation cantrip or another cantrip from the wizard spell list.

feat_sub_arcane_shot.name: Arcane Shot
feat_sub_arcane_shot.description: You can imbue your arrows with magical effects. You learn Arcane Shot options and can use them a limited number of times.

feat_sub_magic_arrow.name: Magic Arrow
feat_sub_magic_arrow.description: Your ranged weapon attacks count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

feat_sub_curving_shot.name: Curving Shot
feat_sub_curving_shot.description: When you miss with an Arcane Shot, you can redirect the shot to another target.

feat_sub_additional_arcane_shot_option.name: Additional Arcane Shot Option
feat_sub_additional_arcane_shot_option.description: You learn another Arcane Shot option.

feat_sub_ever_ready_shot.name: Ever-Ready Shot
feat_sub_ever_ready_shot.description: You regain an Arcane Shot use whenever you roll Initiative and have none remaining.

feat_sub_student_of_war.name: Student of War
feat_sub_student_of_war.description: You gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools.

feat_sub_combat_superiority.name: Combat Superiority
feat_sub_combat_superiority.description: You learn maneuvers and can fuel them with superiority dice.

feat_sub_additional_superiority_die.name: Additional Superiority Die
feat_sub_additional_superiority_die.description: You gain an additional superiority die.

feat_sub_know_enemy.name: Know Your Enemy
feat_sub_know_enemy.description: You can size up a creature and learn clues about its physical capabilities and defenses.

feat_sub_improved_superiority.name: Improved Superiority
feat_sub_improved_superiority.description: Your superiority die becomes larger, improving the effect of your maneuvers.

feat_sub_restless.name: Restless
feat_sub_restless.description: Your combat training lets you recover and press on with remarkable endurance.

feat_sub_cavalier_bonus_proficiency.name: Bonus Proficiency
feat_sub_cavalier_bonus_proficiency.description: You gain proficiency in one of the following: Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion.

feat_sub_born_to_the_saddle.name: Born to the Saddle
feat_sub_born_to_the_saddle.description: You have advantage on checks to stay mounted, and mounting or dismounting costs you less effort.

feat_sub_unwavering_mark.name: Unwavering Mark
feat_sub_unwavering_mark.description: You can mark a target you hit, making it harder for that target to ignore you.

feat_sub_warding_maneuver.name: Warding Maneuver
feat_sub_warding_maneuver.description: You can protect yourself or a nearby ally by interposing your defense at the right moment.

feat_sub_hold_the_line.name: Hold the Line
feat_sub_hold_the_line.description: You become far better at locking enemies in place and punishing movement near you.

feat_sub_ferocious_charger.name: Ferocious Charger
feat_sub_ferocious_charger.description: When you charge into battle, your momentum can destabilize or knock enemies aside.

feat_sub_vigilant_defender.name: Vigilant Defender
feat_sub_vigilant_defender.description: Your battlefield awareness sharpens, allowing you to react almost instantly to threats.

feat_sub_improved_critical.name: Improved Critical
feat_sub_improved_critical.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.description: You add your proficiency bonus to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution checks that don't already use it, and your physical feats become more impressive.

feat_sub_additional_fighting_style.name: Additional Fighting Style
feat_sub_additional_fighting_style.description: You gain one additional Fighting Style.

feat_sub_superior_critical.name: Superior Critical
feat_sub_superior_critical.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18, 19, or 20.

feat_sub_survivor.name: Survivor
feat_sub_survivor.description: You attain an exceptional ability to keep fighting when badly wounded.

feat_sub_spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
feat_sub_spellcasting.description: You learn to cast wizard spells. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

feat_sub_weapon_bond.name: Weapon Bond
feat_sub_weapon_bond.description: You can form a mystical bond with a weapon, letting you summon it or use it more fluidly in combat.

feat_sub_war_magic.name: War Magic
feat_sub_war_magic.description: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a Bonus Action.

feat_sub_eldritch_strike.name: Eldritch Strike
feat_sub_eldritch_strike.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it has disadvantage on the next saving throw you force it to make before the end of your next turn.

feat_sub_arcane_charge.name: Arcane Charge
feat_sub_arcane_charge.description: You can teleport a short distance when you use Action Surge.

feat_sub_improved_war_magic.name: Improved War Magic
feat_sub_improved_war_magic.description: When you use your action to cast a spell, you can make one weapon attack as a Bonus Action.

feat_sub_knighthood.name: Knighthood
feat_sub_knighthood.description: You gain a status and martial identity tied to noble or disciplined service, reinforcing your role as a battlefield leader.

feat_sub_rallying.name: Rallying
feat_sub_rallying.description: You can inspire nearby allies and give them courage through your presence.

feat_sub_knights_standard.name: Knight's Standard
feat_sub_knights_standard.description: You carry a symbol of authority that reinforces your leadership and battlefield control.

feat_sub_royal_envoy.name: Royal Envoy
feat_sub_royal_envoy.description: Your status makes you a capable representative and negotiator in social encounters.

feat_sub_bulwark.name: Bulwark
feat_sub_bulwark.description: You become a steadfast defender who can hold ground and shelter allies.

feat_sub_legion_commander.name: Legion Commander
feat_sub_legion_commander.description: Your command presence improves, allowing you to coordinate allies more effectively.

feat_sub_uncheckable.name: Uncheckable
feat_sub_uncheckable.description: Your authority and resolve become extremely difficult to challenge in battle.

feat_sub_rune_carver.name: Rune Carver
feat_sub_rune_carver.description: You learn to inscribe runes that grant powerful magical effects. You know several runes and can invoke them with your gear.

feat_sub_giants_might.name: Giant's Might
feat_sub_giants_might.description: You can draw on giant magic to grow in size and become more powerful in melee.

feat_sub_runic_shield.name: Runic Shield
feat_sub_runic_shield.description: You can use runic magic to impose disadvantage on an attack against a creature within your reach.

feat_sub_great_stature.name: Great Stature
feat_sub_great_stature.description: Your giant magic becomes stronger, increasing the benefits of Giant's Might.

feat_sub_master_of_runes.name: Master of Runes
feat_sub_master_of_runes.description: You can use your runes more freely and with greater mastery.

feat_sub_runic_juggernaut.name: Runic Juggernaut
feat_sub_runic_juggernaut.description: Your giant power peaks, making you a devastating force on the battlefield.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: A fighter who uses magic to empower ranged attacks.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: A tactical fighter who masters battlefield maneuvers.

subclasses.name: Cavalier
subclasses.description: A mounted protector and defender of allies.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: A martial specialist focused on physical perfection and critical hits.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: A fighter who blends martial prowess with arcane spellcasting.

subclasses.name: Legion Banneret
subclasses.description: A battlefield leader whose banner inspires and protects allies.

subclasses.name: Rune Knight
subclasses.description: A fighter who channels giant magic through runes and transformation.
